# terrible_community_general_consul_role (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) A name used to identify the role.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description of the role. If not specified, the assigned description is not changed.
- `node_identities` (String) List of node identities to attach to the role. If not specified, any node identities currently assigned are not changed. If the parameter is an empty array (`[]`), any node identities assigned are unassigned.
- `policies` (String) List of policies to attach to the role. Each policy is a dict. If the parameter is left blank, any policies currently assigned are not changed. Any empty array (`[]`) clears any policies previously set.
- `service_identities` (String) List of service identities to attach to the role. If not specified, any service identities currently assigned are not changed. If the parameter is an empty array (`[]`), any node identities assigned are unassigned.
- `state` (String) Whether the role should be present or absent.
- `templated_policies` (String) The list of templated policies that should be applied to the role.

### Read-Only

- `operation` (String) The operation performed on the role.
- `role` (String) The role object.
